en: How was I supposed to know that something wasn't right?
Oh, baby, baby, I shouldn't have let you go
ko: 오, 베이비, 베이비, 너를 보내지 말았어야 했어

en: And now you're right outside, yeah
Show me how you want it to be
Tell me, baby, cause I need to know now
I must confess, I still believe
ko: 베이비, 나, 고백해야 해, 아직 믿고 있어

en: When I'm not with you, I lose my mind
Hit me, baby, one more time
ko: 다시 한 번 나를 쳐줘, 베이비

en: Oh, baby, baby, the reason I breathe is you
ko: 오, 베이비, 베이비, 내가 숨 쉬는 이유는 너야
